top matches.text: Where a product contains an AI system, to which the requirements of this Regulation as well as requirements of the Union harmonisation legislation listed in Section A of Annex I apply, providers shall be responsible for ensuring that a product's product is fully compliant with all applicable requirements under applicable Union harmonisation legislation.
